card_description: Vishnu is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 4 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick identifies Zebra with the Noosphere (Teilhard de Chardin) and proposes that this "Collective Mind" (Corpus Christi) is building itself *backward* in time from the Omega Point."
